message:
perf: Add comptime optimizations for Parquet decoder

- Upgrade Snappy SIMD from 16 to 32 bytes for faster decompression
- Add comptime bit width specialization (1-20) for fused dictionary decode
- Use compile-time masks and shifts instead of runtime calculations
- Add struct size/alignment assertions for Parquet metadata enums

Achieves ~88M rows/sec with Snappy, ~400M rows/sec uncompressed.
